statement: In every magma, Equation 1771 (`x = (y * z) * ((x * w) * u)`) implies Equation 178 (`x = (y * y) * (x * z)`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0925
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w u : G, x = (op (op y z) (op (op x w) u))) :
    ∀ x y z w u : G, x = (op (op y y) (op x z))
